headline: Crypto Surges 20% on AI Adoption Frenzy

article.title: What happens when ChatGPT becomes the front door to crypto
article.summary: ChatGPT could become crypto’s new onboarding gateway, making Bitcoin and wallets easier to use while creating new trust risks.

headline: Ledn Adds Gold to $1B Crypto Lending Portfolio

article.title: Ledn adds Tether Gold as loan collateral, expanding Bitcoin-backed lending model
article.summary: Ledn’s addition of Tether Gold lending comes as tokenized commodities expand, with the sector accounting for nearly 17% of the $43 billion RWA market.

headline: Corn Ship Crosses Hormuz Amid $1B Trade Thaw

article.title: Second Iran-Bound Corn Ship Crossed Hormuz Before Peace Deal
article.summary: A second ship laden with corn bound for Iran transited the Strait of Hormuz just hours before the US-Iran interim deal to end the war and reopen the waterway was announced.

headline: Oil Surges 5% as Hormuz Output Resumes Suddenly

article.title: Stranded Oil Is Streaming Out of Hormuz as Deal Takes Effect
article.summary: A growing stream of stranded oil is making its way out of the Strait of Hormuz and Kuwait said it will start ramping up production, as the US-Iran interim peace deal sparks a flurry of activity that is already pushing Middle East flows toward pre-war levels.

headline: CME Sues CFTC Over $1Bn Bitcoin Futures Approval

article.title: CME Group to Sue CFTC Over Bitcoin Perpetual Futures Approval in Clash Over Dodd-Frank Classification
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

CME Group to Sue CFTC Over Bitcoin Perpetual Futures Approval in Clash Over Dodd-Frank Classification
CME Group plans to sue the CFTC over its approval of bitcoin perpetual futures, arguing the contracts are swaps — not futures — under Dodd-Frank.

headline: Fed Hints 2 Rate Hikes Boosting Bitcoin Volatility

article.title: Fed Signals Possible Rate Hikes as Kevin Warsh Opens ‘New Chapter’ at Central Bank
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Fed Signals Possible Rate Hikes as Kevin Warsh Opens ‘New Chapter’ at Central Bank
The Federal Reserve kept rates unchanged but signaled potential rate hikes under new Chair Kevin Warsh as inflation concerns persist, sending Bitcoin and stocks lower.

headline: Crypto Plunges 8% After Hawkish FOMC Decision

article.title: Morning Minute: Crypto Sinks After Hawkish FOMC
article.summary: Bitcoin slid to $64k as rate hike odds soared after Kevin Warsh's first FOMC presser. But was it Warsh or Saylor truly driving the selloff?

headline: Ireland Boosts Crypto Rules Amid $1Bil Crackdown

article.title: Ireland Tightens Crypto Safeguards in New Financial Crime Action Plan
article.summary: A new National Risk Assessment names crypto-asset misuse among Ireland's top threats, as a 30-point plan tightens checks on crypto funds.

headline: Fed Proposes Stablecoin Rules Amid Regulatory Crackdown

article.title: Federal Reserve rolls out proposing rulemaking requiring stablecoin issuers to maintain customer identification program
article.summary: The Fed rolled out a rule requiring stablecoin issuers to have a program in place to identify customers to combat illicit finance.

headline: Kraken Adds Solana DEX to Core App Suddenly

article.title: Kraken integrates Solana DEX trading into core app, with support for additional networks planned
article.summary: Kraken launches onchain DEX trading to give customers access to thousands of tokens across the Solana ecosystem.

headline: $1Bn Euro Defense Spending At Risk Amid US Review

article.summary: Defence secretary announced decision as he scolded Nato allies for failing to support Washington in Iran war
